name: property managers handling 5–15 rental properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, inefficient report formatting causes late submissions. We automate report formatting instead of manual report preparation and submission.
problem_solved: Inefficient formatting and submission of monthly rent roll reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient formatting and submission of monthly rent roll reports.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, inefficient report formatting causes late submissions. We automate report formatting instead of manual report preparation and submission.
